solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use semantic matching via description_matches_validator — e.g., isInteger accepts any description with 'int'/'uint'/'*', isStringOrFixedString accepts anything mentioning both terms, allowing multiple valid phrasings.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute subprocess (python3 script and optionally clang AST dump) to parse source and extract descriptors rather than simple text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests assert specific descriptor content matches validator semantics; a stub cannot satisfy them without the actual fix since descriptors must be present and semantically consistent.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all three arguments described in instruction.md (string, length, pad_string).
